background: The following data were drawn one observation at a time in the order records: ggbggbgggbgbggbbbggg. The experiment was performed to test the hypothesis about the proportion of defective items in the population.

task.query: Using sequential testing plan, determine whether you would accept or reject a lot on the basis of the observations above.
task.answer: The sampling is stopped at the $16^{\text {th }}$ observation and that the lot would be rejected.
